rulings.Case Title: IN RE: THE BENUSTO BARNACHEA NAPENAS LIVING TRUST DATED JANUARY 20, 2006 (TRUST), WHICH BECAME IRREVOCABLE ON THE DEA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Attendance Of Carlitos Quizmorio At Deposition And Compel Carlitos Quizmorio To Produce Documents And For Reasonable Attorney'S Fees And Expenses; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Richard A. Canatella With Exhibits; Request For Judicial Notice With Exhibits; Proof Of Fax/Mail Service
rulings.Rulings: Matter on Calendar for Tuesday, June 19, 2007. Successor Trustee's motion to compel the attendance of Carlitos Quizmorio at deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Counsel for the deponent is ordered to contact counsel for petitioner forthwith to schedule the deposition. The deposition shall be completed by July 6, 2007. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $440 are to be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. = (BEC/610)
